summary: Sales Commission/Category System Testing Complete. All features working correctly - commission info endpoint returns proper data for sales_executive (Kiran), team_leader, and super_admin roles. Frontend displays commission card, category progress, eye toggle, and Import Historical Sales button as expected. Fixed a bug in ImportButton.jsx where template endpoint was using wrong URL path.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/dashboard/sales-commission-info returns correct data for sales_executive (Kiran) - role, month_revenue, month_accounts, category_name, all 8 categories with thresholds
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/sales-commission-info returns 'not applicable' message for super_admin
Backend: GET /api/import/templates/historical-sales returns template definition with required/optional fields
Backend: POST /api/import/historical-sales-xlsx endpoint exists and requires file upload
Backend: POST /api/import/historical-sales-xlsx correctly restricted to admin/super_admin roles (returns 403 for sales_executive)
Backend: Existing dashboard endpoints still work - lead-funnel, monthly-trend, sales-by-course, leaderboard, filtered-stats
Backend: SALES_CATEGORIES has 8 categories (D through Diamond) with correct thresholds and salaries
Backend: Commission logic correctly returns has_commission=false when revenue < 18,000 AED
Frontend: Commission card visible on Sales Dashboard for sales_executive (Kiran)
Frontend: Commission card shows Current Salary, Revised Salary, Gain/Loss, Earned Commission fields
Frontend: Eye toggle button hides/shows sensitive earnings data
Frontend: Eye toggle reveals actual salary value (AED 2,750) when clicked
Frontend: Category Progress card shows all 8 categories (D, C, B, A, A+, Silver, Gold, Diamond)
Frontend: Category badge displays 'D' correctly based on current month revenue (0 AED)
Frontend: Commission unlock message shown when revenue < 18,000 AED
Frontend: Import Historical Sales button visible ONLY for admin/super_admin
Frontend: Import Historical Sales button NOT visible for sales_executive (Kiran)
Frontend: Import dialog opens correctly with Required/Optional Fields, Instructions, Download Template button
Frontend: All existing dashboard components render correctly (Revenue, Total Leads, Conversion, Top Agents, Team Revenue, Monthly Trend, Leaderboard, Pipeline)
critical_code_review_comments: SALES_CATEGORIES constant properly defined in server.py lines 7609-7618 with 8 categories
Commission info endpoint (line 7620) correctly handles sales_executive, team_leader, and super_admin roles
Historical sales import template endpoint (line 8693) properly defined in generic templates dict
Import button visibility correctly conditioned on ['super_admin', 'admin'].includes(user?.role)

bug_fixed.description: ImportButton.jsx was using wrong template URL path for historical-sales-xlsx type
bug_fixed.root_cause: actualType preferred 'type' prop over 'templateType', causing /import/templates/historical-sales-xlsx to be called instead of /import/templates/historical-sales
bug_fixed.fix: Added templateActualType variable that prioritizes templateType over type for template fetching

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - tested with existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sales Commission/Category system fully tested and working. Key features: (1) sales_executive sees My Earnings card with category-based salary info and Category Progress card with all 8 categories, (2) super_admin/admin see Import Historical Sales button, (3) Eye toggle hides/shows sensitive salary data. Fixed a bug in ImportButton.jsx template URL path. Kiran's current_net_salary is 2750 AED, currently in Category D with 0 revenue this month.
